text:

    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.3.32.2587

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.32.2587

     * New: Bump dotnet to 6.0.32
     * Update SonarCloud pipeline versions
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Remove extraneous indentation in RemoveFileExtension
     * New: Wrap specifications in Custom Format modals
     * Fixed: Assume category path from qBittorent starting with '//' is a Windows
       UNC path

    PR:             280280
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)
